code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
let n = tokens.len()

mut result = ""
mut i = n - 1
mut first = true

while i >= 0
  let token = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end

  if first
    result = token
    first = false
  else
    result = "#{result} #{token}"
  end

  i = i - 1
end

println(result)
